requirement_topic.en: 50 Hz Supply Compatibility Is Necessary but Not Sufficient
requirement_topic.zh: 50 Hz供电兼容是必要但不充分条件
requirement_topic.zht: 50 Hz供電相容是必要但不充分條件

summary.en: Bangladesh EV charger sites should validate the actual utility service voltage, phase arrangement, earthing system, frequency tolerance, protection settings, and power-quality limits for the site. Bangladesh is generally a 50 Hz market, but nominal 50 Hz compatibility alone does not prove local grid acceptance.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国电动汽车充电站应验证场址实际公用事业供电电压、相制、接地系统、频率容差、保护设定和电能质量限值。孟加拉国通常为50 Hz市场，但名义50 Hz兼容本身不能证明当地电网接受。
summary.zht: 孟加拉國電動汽車充電站應驗證場址實際公用事業供電電壓、相制、接地系統、頻率容差、保護設定和電能品質限值。孟加拉國通常為50 Hz市場，但名義50 Hz相容本身不能證明當地電網接受。

standards_or_laws: Bangladesh utility service and distribution-code settings for the site

BERC electricity tariff order (current — BERC announced a tariff revision in 2026 with an average increase of approximately 16.7%; confirm the current LT-D3 EV charging rate from the official BERC tariff schedule before quoting a specific Tk/kWh figure)

summary.en: China also uses a 50 Hz grid, and China GB/T 18487 test files may show 50 Hz operation. That overlap does not confirm Bangladesh voltage range, earthing, utility protection profile, harmonic limits, meter configuration, or commissioning settings.
summary.zh: 中国也采用50 Hz电网，中国GB/T 18487测试文件可能显示50 Hz运行。该重合不能确认孟加拉国电压范围、接地、公用事业保护配置、谐波限值、计量配置或投运设定。
summary.zht: 中國也採用50 Hz電網，中國GB/T 18487測試文件可能顯示50 Hz運行。該重合不能確認孟加拉國電壓範圍、接地、公用事業保護配置、諧波限值、計量配置或投運設定。

standards_or_laws: China 50 Hz domestic grid design basis

gap.en: Check firmware region profiles, input-voltage tolerances, transformers, filters, thermal derating, RCD or residual-current detection, harmonic emissions, protection coordination, and commissioning screenshots against Bangladesh utility settings.
gap.zh: 应按孟加拉国公用事业设定核查固件地区配置、输入电压容差、变压器、滤波器、热降额、RCD或剩余电流检测、谐波发射、保护配合和投运截图。
gap.zht: 應按孟加拉國公用事業設定核查韌體地區配置、輸入電壓容差、變壓器、濾波器、熱降額、RCD或剩餘電流檢測、諧波發射、保護配合和投運截圖。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as part of local utility connection and commissioning where the site is energised in Bangladesh; nominal frequency alone is not an approval
mandatory_status.cn: China 50 Hz evidence is useful but not equivalent to Bangladesh site commissioning

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bangladesh and China both being 50 Hz reduces one hardware gap, but exporters still need Bangladesh site voltage, protection, metering, and utility commissioning evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 孟加拉国和中国均为50 Hz可减少一个硬件差距，但出口商仍需提供孟加拉国场址电压、保护、计量和公用事业投运证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 孟加拉國和中國均為50 Hz可減少一個硬體差距，但出口商仍需提供孟加拉國場址電壓、保護、計量和公用事業投運證據。
